{"analysis":"The zip archive appears to be corrupted but I found the structure. The EOCD is at 3145829, and the archive starts at 3145632. The central directory shows the file is stored (uncompressed) with 33 bytes. Let me read the local file header and data directly from the correct offset. The file data appears to be in two parts: `PASSWORD=8XDP5Q2RT9Z` in one area and `K7VB3BV4WW54` near the CD. Let me read the actual local file header data from offset 3145632.","plan":"1. Read the local file header from offset 3145632
2. Extract the 33 bytes of file data
3. Reconstruct the complete password","commands":[{"keystrokes":"dd if=/app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat bs=1 skip=3145632 count=120 2>/dev/null | od -A d -t x1z
","duration":1.0},{"keystrokes":"dd if=/app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat bs=1 skip=3145704 count=40 2>/dev/null | od -A d -c
","duration":1.0}]}
